gold: Sí, deja encuentro algo para anotarlo.
werNormalizedGold: si deja encuentro algo para anotarlo
sigWerNormalizedGold: si deja encuentro algo para anotarlo

sigWerErrors.reason: 'Deja' (he/she leaves) and 'deje' (I/he/she should leave) are different verb forms, but in this context the meaning is only slightly affected.
'Algo' (something) and 'donde' (where) are completely different words and change the meaning of the sentence significantly.
Omitting 'para' (for) slightly affects the grammatical structure but the main meaning is still understandable.
